ocr_snippet:
PERIPHERAL SMEAR EXAMINATION
RBC Series-Predominantly Microcytic blood picture with moderate Hypochromia. Anisocytosis seen in the forms of Macrocytes and anmocytes.
WBC Series- Adequate in number and morphology.
PLATELET Series- Adequate in number and morphology.
Remarks : DEMORPHIC ANEMIA & TRANSFUSION RELATED CHANGES IN RBC PICTURE.
